textByHash.0aa6732dca3be5f1a29b3f60707d76a8ad0abf2b: I can see that, well done! You've completed all of the tasks in the Lumbridge & Draynor diary! You've earned another reward.
textByHash.0cd37833a4a9cecb6e01737a84aae23fc31b32e5: Quite... You'll be wanting a reward then.
textByHash.2856ec5694c9a28a07aee6c68d9ec4141038eb0e: In addition to the easy rewards, your ring can restore half of your run energy and teleport you to the Draynor cabbage patch three times per day.
textByHash.6870c22df1fb4b044352868653e628b4f99d7b69: level alchemy thirty times per day. The Culinaromancer's chest is now 20% cheaper and you'll receive double wire when thieving in Dorgesh-Kaan.
textByHash.7e5f398c1424b1332f4dd62f19c528e0ddc6dec7: If you complete all of the easy tasks in Lumbridge and Draynor, your ring can recharge half of your run energy twice per day and cast low level alchemy without runes 30 times per day.
textByHash.82ebe88eb05c8d77ef56f1e308f8fdc6cc63a493: Well, there are four different Explorer's rings, which match up with the four levels of difficulty. Each has the same rewards as the previous level and some additional benefits too... which tier of rewards would you like to
textByHash.8443192f55379b8b23417329280e5fba0ca24bd6: One should complete the tasks in Lumbridge and Draynor so they're ticked off, then speak to me to be rewarded.
textByHash.84b6e6bd48b4fc7ef6653a4cf4cd0baae7e42f01: I've upgraded your Explorer's ring for you. It now has unlimited cabbage teleports and four charges to restore half your run energy. Collecting Tears of Guthix will now provide increased experience.
textByHash.852a8ad7c99101e57b415698c73e3e11faba176d: It's a diary that helps you keep track of particular achievements. In the Lumbridge and Draynor area it can help you discover some quite useful things. Eventually, with enough exploration, the inhabitants will
textByHash.ca64dc2762531723f270ebfeb7a0717ec1d4c1e6: You can see the list of tasks on the side-panel.
textByHash.cc3a8888d57009ecda5a8d2b982c3c70e3e796cf: I am Hatius Cosaintus, the taskmaster for the Lumbridge & Draynor Achievement Diary.
textByHash.d298980679d234368db31bbcffde6d0cc48d8872: In addition to the easy and medium benefits, the ring will have unlimited cabbage teleports and four charges to restore half your run energy. Collecting Tears of Guthix will provide increased experience.
textByHash.d328b54e69a1bafb33ae6236bc2ad9e0c853004a: I've upgraded your Explorer's ring for you. In addition to the previous benefits you can now block an additional slayer target with slayer masters, recharge all of your run energy three times per day and cast high
textByHash.dbd92c750a839a87eff2747a229686514e8a3f8f: In addition to the previous tiers of rewards, you can block an additional slayer target with slayer masters, recharge all of your run energy three times per day and cast high level alchemy thirty times per day. The
textByHash.dc91b189ea1093c136936cac43f28a303437a1c0: If you ever lose your ring, come back to me to reclaim it.
textByHash.de025ff94feb4a925b700aab11171ce597392b59: This ring is a symbol of your exploration of Lumbridge and Draynor. It can recharge half of your run energy twice per day and cast low level alchemy without runes 30 times per day.
textByHash.dea2f054e7aef1d2647315daaca64aa3eea33ed7: I've upgraded your Explorer's ring for you. It can restore half of your run energy and teleport you to the Draynor cabbage patch three times per day.
textByHash.fb865ed817aaa06e9dc76de883526455d0aede01: Culinaromancer's chest is 20% cheaper, you can use Fairy rings without needing a dramen or lunar staff and you'll receive double wire when thieving in Dorgesh-Kaan.
